overview: Carl Bean Men's Health and Wellness Center is a nonprofit clinic in Atlanta's West End serving Black gay, bisexual, and heterosexual men. The clinic provides general health services, preventive care, and sexually transmitted infection/disease treatment.
highlights: STD/STI treatment on a sliding fee scale
PrEP and PEP services per CDC guidelines
Free condoms program with mail delivery
targetAudience: Black gay, bisexual, and heterosexual men seeking community-focused primary care and sexual health services.
